description_long: This object consists of two large, cylindrical metal barrels with a weathered yellow paint finish, heavily rusted and corroded in multiple areas. Both barrels feature prominent black and yellow radioactive warning symbols on their sides, indicating hazardous contents. The barrels have reinforced horizontal bands around their circumference and flat, sealed lids on top. One barrel is upright while the other lies on its side, with a greenish liquid spill visible beneath the horizontal barrel, suggesting leakage. The surfaces are rough, pitted, and stained, with visible streaks of rust and grime. These barrels are typically found in industrial or hazardous waste storage areas, and their appearance suggests long-term outdoor exposure.
description: Two large, rusted yellow metal barrels with radioactive warning symbols and heavy corrosion, one leaking green liquid.
description_view_0: Front view shows the upright barrel's radioactive symbol and extensive rust, with the second barrel lying behind it.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the upright barrel's lid and the leaking green liquid pooling beneath the horizontal barrel.
description_view_2: Rear angle reveals the back of the horizontal barrel, more rust, and the green spill extending outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the upright barrel's side and the end of the horizontal barrel, both with visible corrosion and markings.
